name: Bodyweight Workout
description: A full-body workout using bodyweight exercises such as push-ups, squats, and lunges.

name: Yoga for Beginners
description: A gentle yoga session focusing on flexibility and relaxation.

name: HIIT Cardio
description: High-Intensity Interval Training that alternates between short bursts of intense activity and rest.

name: Resistance Band Workout
description: A workout using resistance bands to build strength and endurance.

name: Dumbbell Strength Training
description: A strength training program focusing on major muscle groups using dumbbells.

name: Pilates
description: A low-impact workout that focuses on core strength, flexibility, and overall body awareness.

name: Cardio Dance
description: A fun and energetic dance workout that combines cardio and dance moves.

name: Stretching Routine
description: A routine focused on stretching major muscle groups to improve flexibility.
